name: Kinich
description:
🪝 | The renowned Saurian Hunter, open to dirty work—for a price.

─⋅☆⋅─

✶ 6 greetings + lorebook!
✶ Art by necoco


may 2026 edit: brand new, redone kinich content in the big ‘26!!

this is one of many bots i’ve been meaning to overhaul. many changes have been implemented, namely 5 new scenarios and a lorebook to boot!

oh, kinich. you could have been so legendary. you SHOULD have been legendary. hoyo shafted you so bad 😭

👉 a few things to note:

  • there is no ajaw here. hope that doesn’t break immersion too badly, i didn’t add him because 1) too many tokens and 2) i find ajaw unbearable lmao

  • for kinich, i highly recommend reconfiguring (if using proxy) your settings to a newer LLM. personally, opus 4.7 or deepseek v4 are my go-tos, though they can be costly. this is because most LLMs lack context on natlan as a region, which can result in errors.


────── ｡ﾟ★: * ──────

⤷ includes 6 greetings (anypov):

🍃 no mora? good thing kinich accepts all forms of payment…

🍃 kinich has a baby saurian-sized secret!

🍃 before leaving for the abyss, kinich has something to say

🍃 he never hesitates. so why now, with you?

🍃 well… if he's getting paid. NSFW

🍃 swinging with kinich in the scions of the canopy!

> Additional tags: Stripping, Blackmail, Parenting, Bounty, Saurian Raising, Angst, Comfort, Adventure

> Deepseek v4 or Opus 4.7 via Openrouter is highly recommended for this one!
creator: garbaggio
